title: External Evidence Mutation Freshness
goal: Implement #612 by making external intent evidence freshness safer after tracker mutations.
non_goals: Do not auto-refresh GitHub from the provider-agnostic planning core.
Do not implement #611 typed cli_compatibility schema or #613 roadmap refs routing.

intent.outcome: Compact planning and reconcile outputs make it clear that external evidence is a snapshot and should be refreshed after tracker writes.
intent.constraints: Keep checked-in planning primary and GitHub refresh optional.
intent.latitude: Add provider-agnostic freshness fields, commands, and tests rather than adding provider-specific state mutation.
intent.escalation: Escalate if implementation requires live GitHub calls from summary/reconcile.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue dogfooding-closeout-friction with #613 or #611 when prioritized.
execution.proof: Focused tests and proof-selected commands passed.

invariants: freshness output must not imply live tracker truth when it is only a cached snapshot

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Reduce dogfooding closeout friction from tracker cache, routing, and schema gaps.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #612 lands, continue with #613 or #611 when dogfooding friction remains the selected priority.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Closeout can distinguish cached external evidence from current tracker truth.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: #613 or #611 depending on next dogfooding priority.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement that new lane first. Keep dogfooding as before.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Promote dogfooding-closeout-friction ahead of older lanes and implement its first slice.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Verify this stays provider-agnostic and does not auto-call GitHub from planning summary.

execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Broad external evidence model rewrite or provider adapter changes.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: GitHub-specific refresh implementation unless tests prove it is required.

stop_conditions.stop when: summary/reconcile freshness fields expose snapshot scope and refresh-after-mutation guidance with tests.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Implementation needs live provider calls from summary/reconcile.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Proof fails outside touched scope or indicates unrelated drift.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make external evidence cache freshness safer after tracker mutations.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Provider-agnostic core; no auto GitHub calls from summary/reconcile.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact field names for compact freshness guidance.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A correct fix requires observing tracker mutations directly.

adaptive_assurance.reason: This affects closeout trust state and planning reconciliation.

common_risks: treating cached external evidence as live tracker truth
adding provider-specific behavior to the planning core

active_milestone.scope: Add snapshot freshness and refresh-after-mutation guidance for external evidence.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed #612 slice and leave #613 as the next dogfooding closeout-friction slice.
invariants: External evidence cache is snapshot evidence, not live tracker truth.
GitHub refresh remains an optional adapter.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Expose refresh_after_mutation guidance in freshness payloads.
open_questions_to_close: Closed for this slice: compact summary includes status, refreshed_at, trust_scope, refresh_after_mutation, refresh_command, and fresh_enough_to_trust; detailed report selector can show path and metadata.

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json
completion_criteria: Freshness payload includes snapshot scope and refresh-after-mutation guidance.
Compact summary/reconcile output no longer implies cached evidence is current tracker truth.
Tests cover the new freshness fields.

execution_run.what happened: Added provider-neutral snapshot freshness fields to external work reconciliation and current external work, including trust_scope, refresh_after_mutation, snapshot_rule, and refresh_command. Compact summary/report routing now preserves the high-signal freshness fields without exposing bulky metadata in compact summary.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package installer, planning package tests, root workspace report routing, root summary CLI tests, planning state, and execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q -k external; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section external_work_reconciliation --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json; uv run pytest tests -q; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

Generated closeout adapter; structured execplan fields are authoritative.
Intent: Flag or refresh external evidence after tracker mutations.
Intent satisfied: yes

Changed surfaces: packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py; packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py; tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py; .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml; .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/external-evidence-mutation-freshness.plan.json

durable_residue.learned constraint: Loaded external evidence is only trustworthy as a snapshot; after tracker mutations, agents need a visible refresh command before treating it as current.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Provider-agnostic planning should expose the trust boundary without importing provider-specific refresh into summary/reconcile.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: planning package freshness payload and tests
durable_residue.promotion trigger: If this wording needs host-facing documentation, promote the snapshot rule into external intent evidence docs.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: External evidence freshness now carries snapshot scope and refresh-after-mutation guidance.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused tests and proof-selected full lanes passed.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Planning payload/tests now own the snapshot freshness contract; no Memory promotion.
execution_summary.resume from: Start #613 when continuing the dogfooding closeout-friction lane.

signals routed: empty active TODO title is a compact-summary polish issue to consider in a future planning/router refinement
